# Local frontend dependencies

These files are stored locally so the website does not depend on public CDNs at runtime.

- Bootstrap 5.3.6 — MIT License
- Font Awesome Free 6.7.2 — icons: CC BY 4.0, fonts: SIL OFL 1.1, code: MIT
- jQuery 3.7.1 — MIT License

Upstream license notices are preserved in the distributed files. The complete Font Awesome license is included in `licenses/fontawesome-LICENSE.txt`.
